plugins.name: aidd-overlay
plugins.description: Extends the AIDD framework with project-agnostic workflows: interactive codebase quiz (dig), memory maintenance (harvest, reconcile-normative), obsolescence detection (taste), prospective analysis (foresee), performance audits (data-optimize, web-optimize), project health reporting (status), and planning utilities (decompose, journey, changelog, end-plan). Alias chains: rechallenge, afterplan, endtask, endplan, bump-plugin, previously.

plugins.name: sc-js
plugins.description: JS knowledge provider: sniff, audit, improve, legacy (Vue 2→3/ESM/TS), teach (Nuxt/Vue/Alpine/Vite/Astro). Perf/data pivots for web-optimize and data-optimize.

plugins.name: sc-python
plugins.description: Python-specific skills and workflows: two-tier sniff (pivot model), audit (aidd-dev:reviewer), improve, legacy, log-analysis, teach (Django/FastAPI).

plugins.name: sc-rust
plugins.description: Rust-specific skills and workflows: two-tier sniff (pivot model), audit (aidd-dev:reviewer), improve, legacy, log-analysis, teach (Axum/Actix + SQLx/Diesel).

plugins.name: sc-tiers
plugins.description: Third-party SaaS consumption rules: Firebase Firestore query limits, security rules, quota awareness, Auth listener cleanup, Hosting trailing slash and cache headers. Klaviyo API patterns: 2-step subscribe, 409→PATCH, lists, lazy loading. GTM Consent Mode v2: gtag() vs Array format, ensureGtag(), Meta Pixel consent, event taxonomy. Microsoft Clarity: best-effort model, consent-gated loading, queue init, dual push. PageSpeed Insights / Lighthouse: PSI variance, deterministic metrics, Nuxt 3 perf checklist (LCP/CLS/INP/TBT/bundle/cache).
